name: Max the Racoon
description:
• Color Palette: The fur is primarily a vibrant blue and light gray, straying from natural raccoon colors to fit a more stylized, "fursona" aesthetic.

  • Face & Eyes: He has a large, rounded head with a short snout. His eyes are large, expressive "follow-me" style eyes, typically in a matching shade of blue or black.

  • Mask & Markings: He retains the classic raccoon "mask" around his eyes, usually rendered in a darker blue or black, with white accents on his eyebrows and cheeks to make his expressions more visible.

  • Accessories: Since he is an ASMR creator, he is often seen wearing a lavalier microphone or high-quality headphones over his fursuit head. He frequently wears "human" clothing over the suit, such as hoodies, flannels, or t-shirts, to enhance the "cozy" vibe of his videos.
creator: Jasper09
